programme.desc: Daya meets Manhar Manmoji and tells her father-in-law that he has gone mad; a team of news reporters barge into Gokuldham to talk to Manmoji.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Obsessed with Chakori, Popatlal continues to ignore warnings and keeps going back to the well. But, his stubbornness could have serious consequences.

programme.desc: Popatlal, deeply smitten with Chakori, longs to confess his affection for her. But, he worries about how his friends would react when they finally meet her and learn of their love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide refers to Chakori as a \"Bhootni,\" Popatlal, who is deeply in love with her, is hurt, leading Chakori to depart in anger. But now, Bhide has to convince everybody of his spooky encounter.
